'''watate''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adverbs|adverb]] meaning "[[Wikt:salivatingly|salivatingly]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| w-t-y
|-
! Word class
| [[Adverb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:salivatingly|salivatingly]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| watate
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].[[present]] || [[word:watate|watate]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]] || [[word:watatesher|watatesher]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:watatesherĂ«m|watatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:watatero|watatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:watateshĂ«|watateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:watateshĂ«m|watateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokiwatatero|gokiwatatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokiwatateshĂ«|gokiwatateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokiwatateshĂ«m|gokiwatateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gowatankerom|gowatankerom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gowatankeshĂ«|gowatankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gowatankeshĂ«m|gowatankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gowatankeya|gowatankeya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:wataterom|wataterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:watatemu|watatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:watateya|watateya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokiwataterom|gokiwataterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokiwatatemu|gokiwatatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokiwatateya|gokiwatateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[present]] || [[word:watatate|watatate]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:watatatesher|watatatesher]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:watatatesherĂ«m|watatatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:watatatero|watatatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:watatateshĂ«|watatateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:watatateshĂ«m|watatateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokiwatatatero|gokiwatatatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokiwatatateshĂ«|gokiwatatateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokiwatatateshĂ«m|gokiwatatateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gowatatankerom|gowatatankerom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gowatatankeshĂ«|gowatatankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gowatatankeshĂ«m|gowatatankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gowatatankeya|gowatatankeya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:watataterom|watataterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:watatatemu|watatatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:watatateya|watatateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokiwatataterom|gokiwatataterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokiwatatatemu|gokiwatatatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokiwatatateya|gokiwatatateya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[present]] || [[word:wĂŠtĂŠte|wĂŠtĂŠte]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:wĂŠtĂŠtesher|wĂŠtĂŠtesher]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:wĂŠtĂŠtesherĂ«m|wĂŠtĂŠtesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:wĂŠtĂŠtero|wĂŠtĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:wĂŠtĂŠteshĂ«|wĂŠtĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:wĂŠtĂŠteshĂ«m|wĂŠtĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokiwĂŠtĂŠtero|gokiwĂŠtĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokiwĂŠtĂŠteshĂ«|gokiwĂŠtĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokiwĂŠtĂŠteshĂ«m|gokiwĂŠtĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gowĂŠtĂŠnkerom|gowĂŠtĂŠnkerom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gowĂŠtĂŠnkeshĂ«|gowĂŠtĂŠnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gowĂŠtĂŠnkeshĂ«m|gowĂŠtĂŠnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gowĂŠtĂŠnkeya|gowĂŠtĂŠnkeya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:wĂŠtĂŠterom|wĂŠtĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:wĂŠtĂŠtemu|wĂŠtĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:wĂŠtĂŠteya|wĂŠtĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokiwĂŠtĂŠterom|gokiwĂŠtĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokiwĂŠtĂŠtemu|gokiwĂŠtĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokiwĂŠtĂŠteya|gokiwĂŠtĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[present]] || [[word:waftafte|waftafte]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:waftaftesher|waftaftesher]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:waftaftesherĂ«m|waftaftesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:waftaftero|waftaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:waftafteshĂ«|waftafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:waftafteshĂ«m|waftafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokiwaftaftero|gokiwaftaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokiwaftafteshĂ«|gokiwaftafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokiwaftafteshĂ«m|gokiwaftafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gowaftafnkerom|gowaftafnkerom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gowaftafnkeshĂ«|gowaftafnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gowaftafnkeshĂ«m|gowaftafnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gowaftafnkeya|gowaftafnkeya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:waftafterom|waftafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:waftaftemu|waftaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:waftafteya|waftafteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokiwaftafterom|gokiwaftafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokiwaftaftemu|gokiwaftaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokiwaftafteya|gokiwaftafteya]]
|}

''76 forms generated.''

== See also ==
